title: Robin Follows the Ruins
description: The survival battle tightens as Luffy and Wyper collide while Enel’s forces continue cutting down everyone left in Upper Yard.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this scene centers on Nico Robin, Luffy, Zoro, Wyper, Enel. The survival battle tightens as Luffy and Wyper collide while Enel’s forces continue cutting down everyone left in Upper Yard.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: that even disappeared from the world....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Where did those two come from?

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: We came to avenge our brother!

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: It's no use playing innocent! I'm hotor!!!

summary: The survival battle tightens as Luffy and Wyper collide while Enel’s forces continue cutting down everyone left in Upper Yard.
